response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-native platform design as required; their work centers on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies with minimal evidence of multi-threaded C++ systems, message brokers, or industrial IoT protocols.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with diverse languages and systems
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven architectures and distributed systems
concerns: No demonstrable professional C++ or STL work in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and SDL
No experience with MQTT, REST in industrial contexts, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
